fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the phone number or e-mail address.

fields.name: Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact that the phone number or e-mail address is related to.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the contact to which the phone number is related. There are two options:
